name: circa
description: Reads and writes Circa events, contacts, companies, teams, custom fields, and event/company sub-resources through the Circa REST API.

risk.read: external Circa API read of event, contact, company, team, custom-field, and event/company sub-resource data
risk.write: external mutation of Circa contacts, events, companies, and event-contact registrations; create/update/delete affect live CRM/event data an operator relies on
